name: Message Agent
description: Send a fire-and-forget notification to an agent's inbox. NO response is returned — use agent_request instead if you need a reply. Messages are ephemeral notifications, not tracked tasks. Only use this for one-way alerts or events where you do not need the agent to respond.

message.description: Message content to deliver to the agent's inbox

sessionId.description: Optional session identifier (hex string). Messages sharing a sessionId are treated as part of the same conversation. If omitted, a new session is created and its id returned in the response.
Session the message was delivered into
